content:
💡 video-use | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: Automating video editing through natural language commands processed by AI coding agents.
✨ Key Features: • Cuts filler words and dead space • Auto color grades segments • Adds 30ms audio fades at cuts • Burns in customizable subtitles • Generates animation overlays
📖 Summary: video-use is an open-source Python tool that leverages AI coding agents to automate video editing tasks. It processes raw footage by cutting filler words, applying color grading, adding audio fades, burning in customizable subtitles, and generating animation overlays, all while self-evaluating the output.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
